notes: Internal mythic-structural subcategory dictionary for deity matching diagnostics. These are not user-facing survey categories.

subcategories.label: Source / Origin
subcategories.description: Hidden source, fortune, inner direction, or where something really comes from.

subcategories.label: Self Recognition
subcategories.description: Being recognised, misrecognised, self-named, or placed in relation to one's own identity.

subcategories.label: Becoming / Cultivation
subcategories.description: Practice, development, growth, capacity-building, skill, or becoming able to take form.

subcategories.label: Reception Of The Strange
subcategories.description: Receiving what arrives from elsewhere, hosting unfamiliar presence, or responding to otherness.

subcategories.label: Household Sustaining
subcategories.description: Shared maintenance, distributed burden, household continuity, and relational holding.

subcategories.label: Birth / Arrival
subcategories.description: Emergence, arrival, beginning, safe entry, and the conditions that allow life or possibility to appear.

subcategories.label: Failed Arrival
subcategories.description: Blocked emergence, failed entry, threatened birth, or pressure around arrival that cannot complete.

subcategories.label: Rupture / Harm / Return
subcategories.description: Harm, rupture, catastrophe, injury, return of damage, or the pressure left by what went wrong.

subcategories.label: Mourning / Passage
subcategories.description: Loss, endings, grief, transition, closure, passage, or what remains after something has ended.

subcategories.label: Procedural Order
subcategories.description: Investigation, acknowledgement, fairness, naming, responsibility, and proper sequence.

subcategories.label: Cosmic Law
subcategories.description: Large-scale law, judgement, separation, world-order, and the structure of what must hold.

subcategories.label: Crooked Order
subcategories.description: Distorted law, false order, control, evasion, or a structure that functions wrongly.

subcategories.label: Calling / Initiation
subcategories.description: Being called into role, initiation, vocational pressure, or crossing into responsibility.

subcategories.label: Origin Cost
subcategories.description: The price, wound, risk, or burden carried by origin, birth, or emergence.

subcategories.label: Seasonal Cycle
subcategories.description: Timing, return, cycles, seasonal movement, readiness, and recurring conditions.

subcategories.label: Hidden Force
subcategories.description: Unseen pressure, concealed cause, strange influence, or force operating beneath the visible field.

subcategories.label: Restoration
subcategories.description: Repair, recovery, return to right relation, transformation, or making something whole enough to continue.

subcategories.label: Domestic Care
subcategories.description: Practical care, tending, support, home-field attention, and embodied maintenance.

subcategories.label: Ritual Responsibility
subcategories.description: Ritual obligation, inherited role, sacred responsibility, and correctly held practice.

subcategories.label: Death Crossing
subcategories.description: Crossing death boundaries, underworld passage, judgement beyond life, or traffic between living and dead domains.
